name: BillingCredits
description: Customer has a question about account credits, referral rewards, compensation, cashback, vouchers, or promotional credits on their Virgin Media account — including checking their credit balance, chasing a missing or unapplied credit, or querying when a promised credit will appear. This is about value applied to the VM account, not a refund to the customer's bank.

sampleUtterances.utterance: Where is my {claimType} on my account?
I was promised a {claimType} but it hasn't been applied
When will my {claimType} be applied to my account?
Why haven't I received my refer a friend {claimType} ?
I referred someone to Virgin Media but the {claimType} isn't showing
How much {claimType} do I currently have on my account?
I'm entitled to {claimType} for my delayed installation
I was told I'd get a {claimType} for a missed engineer appointment
How much {claimType} am I due for the days I had no service?
My {claimType} hasn't appeared on my latest bill
I have a {claimType} missing from my account balance
Can you check if the {claimType} has been applied?
I forgot to add the referral code when I signed up — can I still get the {claimType} ?
Where can I see my {claimType} balance in the app?
My friend got their {claimType} but I haven't received mine
I signed up with a promotional {claimType} offer but it's not on my account
The {claimType} I was promised hasn't shown up after three weeks
My bill is higher than expected because my {claimType} wasn't applied
I used a friend's referral link to sign up — where is my {claimType} ?
Can you tell me what {claimType} are outstanding on my account?
I was given a {claimType} as a goodwill gesture but it's not showing
credit on my account
